# team_100 — LOD400 SEO/GEO/AEO Characterization & Work Package

**Project:** EyalAmit.co.il-2026 · **Owner:** team_100 (lead SEO/GEO strategist) · **Date:** 2026-06-19 · **Status:** LOD200→LOD400 upgrade
**Single objective:** Maximize ORGANIC traffic via BOTH classic search (Google) AND generative/answer engines (ChatGPT/SearchGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews + AI Mode, Gemini, Claude, Copilot).
**Repo ground-truth verified 2026-06-19** against `site/wp-content/themes/ea-eyalamit/`: zero JSON-LD, zero OG/Twitter tags, no `<title>`/canonical management in-theme, no `robots.txt` in `site/` root (only `hub/dist/robots.txt`, an internal artifact), no `llms.txt`, only 4 `wp_head` hooks (`ea_w2_09_meta_description`, `ea_w2_09_favicon`, `ea_w2_08_hreflang`, `ea_wave2_print_analytics_head`), analytics gated dark, footer/about brand string still carries the demoted "סטודיו נשימה מעגלית".

---

## 1. Executive summary

This is a **genuinely low-volume Hebrew niche**. The four pillars are unequal: `סאונד הילינג` is the largest but is owned by event aggregators; `דיג'רידו למכירה` is mid commercial-commodity; `שיעורי דיג'רידו` is small and a 3-horse race (Eyal, **Gonen Berlev / didge.co.il**, **Ohad Azoulay / tagaya.co.il**); `טיפול בדיג'רידו` — Eyal's true core — is the **smallest**, and he already ranks. *(Relative ordering is SERP-inferred, not volume-measured — flagged uncertain; verify in GSC/Keyword Planner before sizing content spend.)*

Therefore head-term ranking will **not** move the business. The win is **owning the informational long-tail + adjacent demand** that is far larger than literal "didgeridoo therapy": above all the **snoring / obstructive sleep-apnea (נחירות / דום נשימה בשינה)** cluster, anchored by the **named BMJ 2006 Puhan RCT** Eyal already references. This is the single largest organic-traffic lever in the niche and simultaneously the strongest E-E-A-T / AI-citation asset.

The highest-ROI infrastructure gap is **JSON-LD entity grounding (0% built)** — a connected `@graph` (Person, ProfessionalService, Service-per-route, FAQPage, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList) that deterministically maps **Eyal Amit → cbDIDG → טיפול בנשימה באמצעות דיג'רידו → פרדס חנה**. Schema is a *differentiator, not a requirement* for AI features (Google's own position; vendor "2-4x" multipliers are inflated and must not be quoted) — but it materially improves extraction/attribution and is the cheapest large win because the content already exists (4 deep service pages, 79-item /faq).

Off-site, a Hebrew solo brand is disproportionately decided by **Google Business Profile + Hebrew Wikipedia + Wikidata**. Eyal already holds the rarest asset — a **he.wikipedia.org article** — but it is not wired via `sameAs` and there is **no Wikidata Q-ID** and **no claimed/optimized GBP**. These off-site, mostly no-code assets are the leverage points.

Two corrections fold into the LOD400 baseline: (a) **FAQ rich results are deprecated** (Google docs note 7 May 2026) — keep FAQPage JSON-LD for AI/entity extraction only, not as a Google SERP play; (b) **self-serving Review/AggregateRating on the business's own entity is rich-result-ineligible** (2019, re-confirmed Dec 2025) — keep testimonials as on-page E-E-A-T, route star ambition to GBP, do **not** schema them.

---

## 2. Strategic pillars

1. **Entity authority over head-term chasing.** Establish Eyal as the verifiable Person entity and "leading answer" (תשובה מובילה) for breath-therapy-via-didgeridoo — anchored on cbDIDG, Mukesh Dhiman lineage, the BMJ evidence, and Pardes Hanna. Differentiate AWAY from "veteran teacher-builder since 1999" (Gonen Berlev claims the identical year and frame).
2. **Capture adjacent + informational demand.** Win the sleep-apnea/snoring bridge and the question-form long-tail the bigger-but-shallow competitors miss, routing high-volume medical-curiosity into the therapy-lead funnel.
3. **Machine-grounding infrastructure.** A single hand-rolled JSON-LD `@graph` + per-route meta/canonical/OG + answer-first blocks = the convergent classic-SEO/AEO/GEO layer.
4. **Off-site Hebrew authority cluster.** GBP (claimed, category-correct, review-engine) + Wikidata (links he.wikipedia) + `sameAs` wiring + a couple of Hebrew media mentions — worth more per unit in Hebrew's thin source pool.
5. **Renewable freshness via the blog.** Service pages are evergreen; the blog hub-and-spoke (pillars /treatment + /method; spokes on BMJ/sleep-apnea, circular-breathing-vs-rebirthing, "what is cbDIDG") is the only freshness engine and the topical-authority builder.
6. **Responsible YMYL credibility.** No cure/efficacy promises; cite mechanism claims; keep the visible disclaimer — both compliance and a trust signal that keeps cautious engines (Claude, AI Overviews) willing to cite.

---

## 3. Current-state baseline vs gaps

| Layer | Current state (verified) | Gap to LOD400 |
|---|---|---|
| Structured data | **Zero JSON-LD** anywhere in theme | Build full connected `@graph` |
| Meta layer | Front-page-only meta description; tagline fallback; **no `<title>`/canonical/OG/Twitter** | Per-route title/desc/canonical/OG on all core routes |
| Crawl policy | **No `robots.txt`** in `site/` root; relies on WP-core default sitemap | Real robots.txt allowing search/user bots + sitemap directive |
| hreflang | Only on /en + HE front page; he + x-default both → `/`; no inner pairs | Reciprocal per-pair; /en gets `lang=en`+`dir=ltr` |
| Local/GBP | NAP prose-only; brand string carries demoted "נשימה מעגלית"; **no GBP, no Wikidata** | Lock one canonical NAP; claim GBP (SAB); create Wikidata |
| Content | 4 deep pillar service pages + 79-Q /faq + answer-first H2s present | Blog spoke layer empty; sleep-apnea pillar missing; answer blocks not tightened to 40–60w |
| Analytics | Gated dark (combined GA4+Clarity gate; Clarity `__PENDING_EYAL__`) | Split gate so GA4 fires; add AI-referral tracking |
| Perf | GeneratePress lean; JPG hero/portrait/logo; self-hosted hero video; unsystematic alt/dims | WebP pass, LCP poster, INP audit of FAQ/AB JS |

**Explicitly DE-PRIORITIZED (do not spend M5 budget):** `llms.txt` (97% of files get zero requests; Google/Mueller confirm not read — at most an auto-generated file later, earns ~nothing); **self-serving Review/AggregateRating schema** on the business entity (rich-result-ineligible since 2019, re-confirmed Dec 2025 — keep testimonials as on-page E-E-A-T, route stars to GBP); engineering FAQPage **for Google rich results** (deprecated 7 May 2026 — deploy for AI extraction only).

---

## 5. GEO / AI-engine plan

**Crawler-access policy (T11).** Posture for a small brand that WANTS exposure: **allow all search-time + user bots** (the citation channel) and it is safe to also allow training bots. The common "block training / allow search" advice has a trap — allowing GPTBot but blocking OAI-SearchBot still kills ChatGPT citations. Concrete must-allow (re-verify exact tokens against providers' live docs at build, they change frequently): OpenAI **OAI-SearchBot** + **ChatGPT-User** (GPTBot is training-only); Anthropic **Claude-SearchBot** + **Claude-User** (ClaudeBot is training-only); **PerplexityBot** + **Perplexity-User**; **Googlebot** (this — NOT Google-Extended — feeds AI Overviews/AI Mode; blocking Google-Extended does NOT remove you from AI Overviews); **Bingbot** (ChatGPT leans on Bing top-10). Watch the ~27% CDN/WAF accidental-block trap at M7 cutover. **GPTBot allow/block remains a logged decision (D3)** — recommend allow.

**Schema (T1–T4, T18, T20).** One hand-rolled connected `@graph` is the lower-risk path for THIS theme (already 100% theme-native, no SEO plugin). Nodes: ProfessionalService #business (NAP, openingHoursSpecification for by-appointment, areaServed per D2, `sameAs`); Person #person (Eyal, `knowsAbout`, `worksFor`→#business, `sameAs` chain); Service per route (provider→#business, via hasOfferCatalog/makesOffer); FAQPage; BlogPosting (author→#person); BreadcrumbList; Product/Offer (shop); Article+`citation` (sleep-apnea pillar). Critical failure mode to avoid: schema collision — if an SEO plugin is ever added, assign schema ownership to exactly ONE source and turn the plugin's schema OFF. Present schema benefit as "materially improves extraction/attribution probability" — **do NOT quote the 2-4x / 3.2x vendor multipliers** (verified inflated; a controlled Ahrefs test found near-zero causal lift on already-cited pages).

**Answer-first content (T7).** Retrieve→rank→**extract**→attribute. Tighten each question-H2 to a self-contained 40–60w answer, inject named entities/exact facts/stats, keep clean heading hierarchy.

**llms.txt verdict: SKIP as a priority.** Decoration in 2026; revisit only as a harmless auto-generated file later.

---

## 6. Local SEO plan

**Subtype decision (resolves long-open question):** **ProfessionalService** + a separate **Person** node — NOT HealthAndBeautyBusiness (it is the spa/salon branch, mis-frames a breath-therapy authority, and Eyal banned it). **(D5 — recommend close as ProfessionalService.)**

**Service-area vs storefront (D6 — DO NOT lock before confirming with Eyal):** The prior "omit address / pure-SAB + GeoCircle" default is **unsafe**. Google's own test is binary — *does the business serve customers at its address?* The Pardes Hanna studio is **at Eyal's home and clients come by appointment**, which by Google's definition = a place that serves customers there → **show address (or hybrid), do not hide**. Hiding a real visited address has caused measured local-pack ranking collapse in controlled tests, and proximity to Pardes Hanna searchers is exactly the lane we want to win. Recommended posture pending Eyal: **hybrid** — verified address on file, displayed, **no set business hours**, "by appointment" attribute; areaServed = bounded GeoCircle (Pardes Hanna + north/center catchment), **not** `areaServed:Israel`. Only fall back to hidden-address SAB if Eyal refuses to publish the home address for privacy (accepting the ranking trade-off). **Schema areaServed must equal GBP service area.**

**GBP (T5):** claim/complete first; closest-fit primary category from the IL picker + ≤9 secondaries; Services = exact Hebrew head terms; ≤750-char keyword-natural description; keyworded photos + short video.

**Reviews (T14):** no-incentive, no-gating, every-client post-session ask from their own device; ~3–10/month steady beats bursts; owner reply ≤24h; never use חינם/הנחה/הגרלה.

**Citations (T6):** lock ONE canonical NAP, then mirror byte-identically across **דפי זהב/B144**, **זאפ**, **Waze**, **Facebook**, + 1–2 niche IL wellness indexes. Fix the footer brand string first.

---

## 7. Content & topical-authority plan

**Clusters (T12):** pillars = **/treatment + /method (cbDIDG)**; spokes = BlogPosting articles on the long-tail already buried in FAQ/prose — "נשימה מעגלית בדיג'רידו איך לומדים", "דיג'רידו לדום נשימה ונחירות — מחקר BMJ" (T4), "מהי שיטת cbDIDG", "ריברסינג מול נשימה מעגלית" (T13), "ההבדל בין טיפול בדיג'רידו לסאונד הילינג". Hub→spoke + lateral links; every spoke links up to its service + CTA. 10 well-structured clustered articles outperform 100 scattered ones.

**E-E-A-T:** visible author byline (headshot + credentialed bio + link to /eyal-amit) and "עודכן לאחרונה" date on every post/service page; first-hand EXPERIENCE markers (real Pardes Hanna studio photos/video, named cbDIDG protocol steps, Mukesh lineage, the **veteran/PTSD case study** — a citeable asset no competitor has); replace stock/decorative imagery with original photos.

**Differentiate the entity (T3/T7):** anchor on breath-THERAPY (cbDIDG, Mukesh lineage, BMJ mechanism, Pardes Hanna center) — NOT on "veteran teacher-builder since 1999," which **Gonen Berlev claims verbatim** (confirmed: didge.co.il/about says "מאז שנת 1999"). Do not lean the H1/title on "מאז 1999" as the differentiator.

**Responsible health claims:** no cure/guarantee/efficacy; frame outcomes as supportive/guided breath-and-sound practice; keep the shared disclaimer visible; add "התייעצו עם איש מקצוע רפואי" near health-adjacent benefits; back mechanism claims with citations (BMJ).

---

## 8. Technical SEO plan

**CWV (T17):** GeneratePress makes LCP/CLS easy; **INP is the risk** (JS-driven) concentrated in FAQ accordions + `ea-ab-testing.js` — defer non-critical JS (WP 6.3 `strategy=defer`, keep GP `menu.min.js` excluded), break long tasks. **LCP target ≤2.5s** (the 2.0s "March-2026 tightening" is unconfirmed vendor lore; treat 2.0s as buffer only). Self-hosted hero `<video>` must NOT be the LCP element — use a `fetchpriority=high` poster. WebP delivery; explicit width/height everywhere (CLS<0.1).

**Schema inventory (T1–T4, T18, T20):** Person, ProfessionalService, Service×4, FAQPage, BlogPosting/Article, BreadcrumbList, Product/Offer, Article+citation, VideoObject (only for a real content video — not the muted hero loop). Hand-rolled single `@graph`, one source of schema.

**Sitemap/robots (T11):** ONE sitemap source (WP-core default unless a plugin is added — never two); robots.txt aligned with it; publish sitemap location; verify staging noindex (`ea-staging-noindex.php`, *.upress.link) lifts at M7.

**Internal linking (T12):** hub-and-spoke; descriptive Hebrew anchor text ("טיפול בדיג'רידו"); BreadcrumbList reinforces hierarchy.

**Plugin decision (D4):** recommend **stay 100% theme-native** and add per-route title/meta/canonical/OG hooks in `wave2-w2-09.php` (T9/T10). If a plugin is later needed, add **Rank Math or Yoast for meta+canonical+redirects+sitemap ONLY with its schema module OFF** — never run two schema engines.

**RTL/Hebrew (T19):** `dir=rtl`+`lang=he` on Hebrew pages; /en flips to `lang=en`+`dir=ltr`; reciprocal per-pair hreflang. Clean English URLs already in use (/treatment, /method, /sound-healing) — correct, keep.

---

## 9. Measurement & KPIs — how we will KNOW organic traffic grew

**Unblock first (T16):** split the GA4+Clarity gate so GA4 fires; connect/verify **GSC** property (mandatory, currently unconfirmed).

**Classic-search KPIs (GSC):** total organic clicks/impressions; average position + impressions for the target question-form long-tail and geo terms; clicks to /treatment, /method, the sleep-apnea pillar; "rich results / breadcrumb" status; Core Web Vitals (field) pass rate post-cutover.

**AI-discovery KPIs (GA4 + manual):** referral sessions from `chatgpt.com`, `perplexity.ai`, `gemini.google.com`, `bing.com` (Copilot); AI-assisted landing pages; lead-source attribution by landing page; periodic manual citation checks (does ChatGPT/Perplexity/AI-Overviews name Eyal for "טיפול בדיג'רידו", "דיג'רידו לדום נשימה בשינה", "מהי שיטת cbDIDG").

**Conversion KPIs:** intro-call / WhatsApp / contact-form events (the single core conversion path = therapy lead → intro call); GBP actions (calls, direction requests, review velocity ~3–10/month, owner-reply latency ≤24h).

**Note:** true SEO/perf/CWV numbers are unmeasurable until M7 production cutover (staging is noindex) — set GSC/GA4 baseline at cutover, measure deltas thereafter.

---

## 10. Phasing roadmap

**Quick wins (low effort, ship in M5):** T2 (FAQPage), T10 (OG/Twitter), T11 (robots.txt), T13 (disambiguation page), T15 (geo layer), T16 (analytics gate), T18 (breadcrumbs), T19 (hreflang). 
**Foundational (medium, M5–M6):** T1 (`@graph`), T3 (Person), T6 (NAP lock), T7 (answer-first tightening), T9 (titles/meta/canonical), T17 (image/CWV), T20 (buying guide), T21 (training page). 
**Off-site / parallel (no-code, owner-dependent):** T5 (GBP), T8 (Wikidata), T14 (reviews engine) — start immediately, gate only on D1/D6. 
**Ongoing:** T12 (blog cluster + freshness cadence), T14 (review velocity), T16 (measurement), recurring content refresh. 
**M7 cutover gate:** verify robots/sitemap live, staging noindex lifted, CDN/WAF not blocking AI bots, GSC/GA4 baseline captured.

---

## 11. Risks

- **Entity collision (high):** Gonen Berlev shares "מאז 1999" + same health framing; Ohad Azoulay also cites studies and uses "מרכז." Mitigation: differentiate on breath-THERAPY + cbDIDG + Mukesh lineage + cite the BMJ RCT *better* (named + structured). Do not lean on "1999" as differentiator.
- **Address-hiding ranking trap (high):** defaulting to hidden-address SAB could suppress the exact local-pack visibility we want. Mitigation: D6 — confirm visitable-studio with Eyal, default to hybrid show-address.
- **Schema collision (medium):** never run hand-rolled `@graph` + plugin schema together.
- **YMYL claims (medium):** over-broad benefit claims read as medical promise. Mitigation: responsible-claims pass + citations + disclaimer.
- **Review-policy penalty (medium):** a naive "ask happy clients / offer thank-you" flow now damages the profile. Mitigation: no-incentive, no-gating engine (T14).
- **Low-volume reality (medium):** head terms won't move the business; over-investing in them is wasted effort. Mitigation: long-tail + adjacency focus; verify volumes in GSC before sizing.
- **Wasted effort on deprecated/decoration assets (low, but recurring temptation):** FAQ-for-rich-results, self-serving Review schema, llms.txt. Mitigation: explicit de-prioritization above.
- **Stale-date anti-pattern (low):** audit caught live 2025 workshop dates. Mitigation: auto-archive expired events; truthful sitemap lastmod.

---

## 12. Open decisions (need client / Nimrod)

- **D1 — Canonical NAP & business name (BLOCKS T5/T6 and all citations):** confirm the single official name (resolve the demoted "סטודיו נשימה מעגלית" string), address format, E.164. *Recommend: lead with "המרכז לטיפול בנשימה באמצעות דיג'רידו / cbDIDG", drop "נשימה מעגלית" from the name.*
- **D2 — areaServed / geo:** Eyal left this open ("no areaServed:Israel default; no precise geo without decision"). *Recommend: bounded GeoCircle around Pardes Hanna (north/center), matched to GBP.*
- **D3 — GPTBot allow vs block:** *Recommend allow (training inclusion helps a tiny brand; OAI-SearchBot/ChatGPT-User allowed regardless).* Log the decision.
- **D4 — SEO plugin vs theme-native for meta/canonical/sitemap/redirects:** *Recommend theme-native; if a plugin, schema module OFF.*
- **D5 — Business schema subtype:** *Recommend close as ProfessionalService + Person (not HealthAndBeautyBusiness).*
- **D6 — GBP address display (DO NOT lock before confirming):** is the Pardes Hanna home studio visited by clients? If yes → show address / hybrid, no set hours, by-appointment attribute. If Eyal refuses to publish the home address → hidden-address SAB (accept ranking trade-off).
- **D7 — Primary conversion goal:** treatment leads / lesson leads / workshop registrations / content authority. *Recommend: therapy lead → intro call as the single core path.*
- **D8 — Books & products role:** core growth area or supporting authority layer; products inquiry-only or content-led commerce (T20). *Recommend: products = content-led, secondary; books = authority layer.*
- **D9 — Health-claim conservatism level:** confirm tolerance for benefit phrasing (T-responsible-claims pass).
- **D10 — Confirm Mukesh memorial facts/dates/images** (flagged pending Eyal) to complete the heritage entity node + 301 target.
- **D11 — GA4 ID source-of-truth mismatch:** in-theme `inc/analytics-config.json` shows GA4 `__PENDING_EYAL__`; the hub copy reportedly holds `G-MRXESK7QJF`. Reconcile before T16.
- **D12 — Verify Hebrew keyword volumes** (GSC/Keyword Planner) before sizing content investment — the niche-demand ordering is SERP-inferred, not measured (verification: uncertain).
